summary: Website updates: add non-blocking autoplay chainsaw sound effects on the homepage; add a new "Camp Riley" kids show (coming 2027) with a generated description and AI image; replace the "Grave Danger Dance" scare zone image with an AI-generated "Undead Dance Party" image.
architectural_notes: Homepage audio should autoplay without blocking page rendering; ensure compliance with browser autoplay policies (may require user interaction fallback).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Kid-friendly spooky camp at night illustration with lanterns, friendly cartoon monsters, and cozy cabins (show-camp-riley.dim_1400x900.jpg)
- Neon-lit graveyard dance party illustration with undead skeletons dancing, glowing tombstones, fog, and disco lights (zone-undead-dance-party.dim_1400x900.jpg)

existing_features.title: Ensure the homepage attempts to autoplay the looping chainsaw background audio on initial page load, and if browser autoplay restrictions block playback, the site must remain fully usable while presenting a non-blocking way to start audio via a user gesture (e.g., existing header sound controls).
Add a new show entry named "Camp Riley" to the shows list, marked as a kid show "Coming 2027", with an original, cool English description generated by the app build (no placeholder text).
Wire an AI-generated image for the new "Camp Riley" show into the existing generatedImages mapping so it renders in the show card.
Replace the existing "Grave danger dace" scare zone image with an AI-generated "Undead Dance Party" image by updating the generated image mapping used by the Scare Zones section.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add non-blocking autoplay chainsaw sound effects on the homepage.
Add new show "Camp Riley" (kid show, coming 2027) with generated description and AI-generated image.
Replace the "Grave Danger Dance" scare zone image with an AI-generated "Undead Dance Party" image.

projectName: Autoplay chainsaw audio on homepage, add Camp Riley (Coming 2027) show with AI image, and replace Grave Danger Dance image with Undead Dance Party
